query:
SELECT COUNT(*)::BIGINT
                FROM ciphertext_digest d
                WHERE d.ciphertext IS NULL
                   OR (
                     d.ciphertext128 IS NULL
                     AND EXISTS (
                       SELECT 1
                       FROM ciphertexts128 c
                       WHERE c.handle = d.handle
                         AND c.ciphertext IS NOT NULL
                     )
                   )
